stimulus.content: A hiker uses a device that receives signals from satellites orbiting Earth. The device shows her exact location on a digital map and gives her directions to the nearest trail. This technology is called the Global Positioning System.

stem: How does GPS technology help the hiker in this passage?

choices.text: It uses satellites to find her exact location
It measures the temperature of the air around her
It predicts the weather for the next week
It takes pictures of the trail from space

answer_explanation: GPS uses signals from satellites to determine a person's exact location on Earth. The hiker's device receives these signals and displays her position on a digital map.
